user.title: Nastavenie iAqualink robota
user.description: Zadajte prihlasovacie údaje k svojmu iAquaLink účtu.

data_description.name: Názov pre váš bazénový robot v Home Assistant
data_description.username: Používateľské meno k vášmu iAquaLink účtu
data_description.include_seconds_remaining: When enabled, the time-remaining sensor updates every poll interval (every few seconds) and includes seconds in its value. Disable to update only when the minute ticks over — this dramatically reduces Home Assistant activity-log entries during long cleaning cycles without slowing down remote-control button responsiveness. Can be toggled later via Configure.

select_device.title: Vyberte robota
select_device.description: Vyberte, ktorého robota pridať do Home Assistant.

data_description.name: Voliteľné: Prepíšte predvolený názov tohto robota

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate iAqualink Robot
reauth_confirm.description: Your iAquaLink credentials for {username} are no longer accepted. Enter the current password to resume the integration without losing entity history.

error.cannot_connect: Nepodarilo sa pripojiť k službe iAquaLink. Skontrolujte svoje prihlasovacie údaje a skúste znova.
error.no_devices: Vo vašom účte neboli nájdení žiadni roboti. Skontrolujte, či je váš robot správne zaregistrovaný v iAquaLink.
error.device_not_found: Vybrané zariadenie sa nepodarilo nájsť. Skúste znova.
error.unknown: Vyskytla sa neočakávaná chyba. Skúste znova.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid iAquaLink credentials. Please check your username and password and try again.

abort.already_configured: Tento robot je už nakonfigurovaný v Home Assistant.
abort.no_serial: No serial number was returned for this robot. The cloud account is reachable but the device list is empty or incomplete. Please try again later.
abort.reauth_successful: Reauthentication successful. The integration has resumed.

init.title: iAqualink Robot Options
init.description: Adjust runtime behavior for this robot.

data_description.include_seconds_remaining: When enabled, the time-remaining sensor updates every poll interval (every few seconds) and includes seconds in its value. Disable to update only when the minute ticks over — this dramatically reduces Home Assistant activity-log entries during long cleaning cycles without slowing down remote-control button responsiveness.

remote_forward.name: Diaľkové dopredu
remote_forward.description: Odošle príkaz dopredu robotovi na diaľkové ovládanie (len pre roboty VR a VortraX)

remote_backward.name: Diaľkové dozadu
remote_backward.description: Odošle príkaz dozadu robotovi na diaľkové ovládanie (len pre roboty VR a VortraX)

remote_rotate_left.name: Diaľkové otočenie doľava
remote_rotate_left.description: Odošle príkaz otočenia doľava robotovi na diaľkové ovládanie (len pre roboty VR a VortraX)

remote_rotate_right.name: Diaľkové otočenie doprava
remote_rotate_right.description: Odošle príkaz otočenia doprava robotovi na diaľkové ovládanie (len pre roboty VR a VortraX)

remote_stop.name: Diaľkové zastavenie
remote_stop.description: Odošle príkaz zastavenia robotovi na diaľkové ovládanie (len pre roboty VR a VortraX)

add_fifteen_minutes.name: Pridať 15 minút
add_fifteen_minutes.description: Pridá 15 minút k času čistenia (len pre roboty VR a VortraX)

reduce_fifteen_minutes.name: Odobrať 15 minút
reduce_fifteen_minutes.description: Odoberie 15 minút z času čistenia (len pre roboty VR a VortraX)
